title: Glass Jar with Airtight Wooden Lid, 35oz Vintage Glass Kitchen Storage Counter Sealed Jar, Decorative Glass Food Storage Containers for Candy, Flour, Oats(Sunflower)
features: 【PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS】The clear food storage container is made of high borosilicate glass, which is high hardness, cold and heat resistance. There is a rubber ring in the lid to prevent air from entering, to ensure the food dry.
【DIMENSIONS】For Glass Jars: 7 inch* 3.85 inch; capacity: 35 Fl oz / 1000 ml; Weight: 610g. This size is suitable for a variety of storage purposes.

【VINTAGE DESIGN JAR】This air tight glass container jar is not only practical but also incredibly stylish and elegant, featuring superb patterns that create an upscale decor statement and blend nicely into any decor!

【SIMPLE TO CLEAN】These canisters are easy and simple to clean by hand or just put them in the dishwasher for your convenience. The glass does not discolor. With these glass jars, you can keep your kitchen clean and tidy.

【FUNCTIONAL STORAGE】The perfect choice for kitchen organization and storage, and storage of various foods. It is an essential appliance for storing bean tea, dried fruit, rice, sugar, flour, coffee beans, seasonings, spices, etc.
